mechanism_narrative: Persistently low federal funds rates compress discount rates applied to equity cash flows, raising valuations and producing positive forward returns over the medium term.
evidence_refs: fact:Federal Reserve maintained near-zero rates during 2009-2014
failure_condition: If 20-day forward returns are negative in periods with FEDFUNDS below 0.5% more than 40% of the time, hypothesis is rejected.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate rises above 7%, it signals labor market weakness that reduces consumer spending and corporate earnings, leading to negative equity returns over the subsequent month.
evidence_refs: fact:UNRATE was 8.1% in August 2014, well above 7% threshold
failure_condition: If SPX 20-day returns are positive in > 50% of instances when UNRATE > 7%, reject.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in retail sales and housing starts indicates strong consumer demand and residential investment, jointly driving economic expansion and bullish equity returns over a quarterly horizon.
failure_condition: If the joint signal (both series above their 12-month moving averages) does not produce positive median 60-day forward returns, reject.

mechanism_narrative: An acceleration in real GDP growth from a low base, as measured by quarterly GDPC1 changes above 0.5%, signals that the economy is entering an early expansion phase, which historically leads to strong equity performance over the following quarter.
evidence_refs: fact:GDPC1 was 11525 in Q2 2014, having grown modestly from earlier years
failure_condition: If the average 60-day forward return following a GDPC1 quarterly change > 0.5% is not significantly above zero (t-test p>0.10), reject.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in industrial production, where the 3-month average exceeds the prior 3-month average by at least 1%, signals improving manufacturing activity, positively forecasting equity returns over the next month.
evidence_refs: fact:INDPRO stood at 101.337 in July 2014, recovering slowly
failure_condition: If the 20-day forward return when trigger is active is not positive in at least 60% of cases, reject.

mechanism_narrative: The combination of low inflation and low policy rates creates a favorable monetary environment where equity cash flows are discounted at low real rates and inflation risk is minimal, boosting stock prices over the medium term.
evidence_refs: fact:CPI stood at 212.174 (low y/y growth) and FEDFUNDS at 0.22%
failure_condition: If the interaction signal (both CPIAUCSL YoY < 2% and FEDFUNDS < 1%) does not produce positive median 20-day returns over rolling 3-year windows, reject.

mechanism_narrative: Housing starts above 500 thousand units indicate a healthy housing market that supports economic growth through construction jobs and related spending, leading to positive equity returns over the next month.
evidence_refs: fact:HOUST was 466 in July 2014, just below threshold
failure_condition: If the 20-day return following HOUST > 500 is not positive on average across all occurrences in the sample period, reject.

mechanism_narrative: A strong monthly growth in retail sales above 0.5% signals robust consumer spending, which directly boosts corporate revenues and equity prices over the short term.
evidence_refs: fact:RSAFS was 346810 in August 2014, up from previous month?
failure_condition: If the 5-day forward return after trigger is not positive in >55% of instances, reject.
